column.name: description
column.value: Train harder with premium gear designed for speed, stability, and everyday confidence.

column.name: description
column.value: Fresh apparel, footwear, and training essentials curated for the new season.

column.name: description
column.value: Discover the highest-rated pieces customers keep coming back for every week.

column.name: hero_banner_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM dbo.hero_banner WHERE title = 'Top Notch Pro Kit')

column.name: hero_banner_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM dbo.hero_banner WHERE title = 'Move Bold' + CHAR(10) + 'Stay Ready')

column.name: hero_banner_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM dbo.hero_banner WHERE title = 'Built For' + CHAR(10) + 'Top Sellers')

column.name: link
column.valueComputed: CONCAT('/products?category=', (SELECT id FROM dbo.category WHERE name = 'Footwear'))

column.name: link
column.valueComputed: CONCAT('/products?category=', (SELECT id FROM dbo.category WHERE name = 'Apparel'))

column.name: link
column.valueComputed: CONCAT('/products?category=', (SELECT id FROM dbo.category WHERE name = 'Accessories'))

column.name: link
column.valueComputed: CONCAT('/products?category=', (SELECT id FROM dbo.category WHERE name = 'Equipment'))

column.name: description
column.value: A premium capsule release with limited quantities, elevated materials, and bold athletic styling.

column.name: description
column.value: Unlock rewards, early access, and exclusive member-only perks every time you shop.

column.name: description
column.value: Earn points with every purchase and redeem them on your next order.

column.name: loyalty_section_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM dbo.loyalty_section WHERE heading = 'Join The Top Notch Club')

column.name: description
column.value: Get early access to drops, bundles, and limited-edition offers.

column.name: loyalty_section_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM dbo.loyalty_section WHERE heading = 'Join The Top Notch Club')

column.name: description
column.value: Receive premium support and special bonuses as your membership grows.

column.name: loyalty_section_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM dbo.loyalty_section WHERE heading = 'Join The Top Notch Club')
